testsuite.name: openapi.OpenApiIntegrationTest

testcase.name: should generate spec for principal-only payload and response with headers
should serve spec at custom path
should produce no spec route when specPath is null

testsuite.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details.
